description: A project manager needs to generate the official monthly progress report for project stakeholders.

nodes.task_description: Gather the latest schedule update, cost report, and safety statistics for the month.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the required data from various systems.

nodes.task_description: Use a reporting template to populate the data into a standard format.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully populates the monthly report template.

nodes.task_description: Generate the final report as a PDF and distribute it to the project stakeholder mailing list.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates the final PDF and emails it to the correct recipients.
